resources.string: Confirm deletion? Associated presets will also be removed.
Switch between dark and light theme
Help us understand app usage and improve product experience. Collected data is used for statistical analysis only and does not contain personal privacy information. Restart app to apply
Free up storage space, images will be re-downloaded next time
Are you sure you want to clear all log files? This action cannot be undone.
Current cache size is %.2f MB. Clearing will free up storage space, images will be re-downloaded next time.
International access, may need proxy in China
Enable 6-layer glass effect for more depth
Are you sure you want to delete this preset? This action cannot be undone.
Add subscriptions in "About" or create new presets
Tap the heart icon to favorite presets
Tap the bottom right button to create a preset
Fetch latest preset config from remote server
Or choose an existing preset as a starting point:

[Environment] Daylight outdoor or well-lit indoor [Scenes] Street, portrait, landscape, architecture [Tips] Classic film aesthetic with rich, vintage colors. Look for scenes with light-shadow contrast to enhance depth

[Environment] Natural or soft artificial light [Scenes] Portraits, still life, cafés, artistic scenes [Tips] Soft light creates dreamy atmosphere. Perfect for emotional photos. Keep the subject in sharp focus

[Environment] Morning, dusk or overcast diffused light [Scenes] Children, gardens, parks, romantic scenes [Tips] Darker tones create mystery. Dreamy soft light for fairy tale vibes. Seek colorful scenes

[Environment] Strong light-shadow contrast, direct sunlight or spotlights [Scenes] Architecture, documentary, street, artistic portraits [Tips] Use contrast to highlight subject contours. Perfect for geometric lines and rich textures. Keep composition clean

[Environment] Natural outdoor light, forests, meadows, plant-rich scenes [Scenes] Plants, forest walks, spring outdoors, fresh portraits [Tips] Bright tones highlight freshness. Greens appear natural and transparent. Perfect for plants and nature

[Environment] Sunny weather or blue sky background [Scenes] Seaside, urban architecture, sky, cool-toned scenes [Tips] Cool tones enhance blue performance. Perfect for sky, water and urban architecture. Creates transparent, calm atmosphere

[Environment] 20 minutes before sunrise or after sunset [Scenes] City night views, bright lights, water reflections [Tips] Strong warm-cool contrast. Perfect for city lights and night scenes. Seek water surfaces for reflection effects

[Environment] Backlit or side-lit scenes [Scenes] Portraits, emotional photography, artistic scenes, soft beauty [Tips] Black mist filter creates dreamy atmosphere. Perfect for beautiful portraits. Use backlight for halo effects

[Environment] Daylight outdoor or ample natural light [Scenes] Japanese-style portraits, street, daily records, travel [Tips] Simulates Fuji NC film. Bright tones, soft natural colors. Perfect for daily records and Japanese aesthetics

[Environment] Natural or soft artificial light [Scenes] Street documentary, humanistic photography, life records, storytelling [Tips] Pro mode with fixed parameters. ISO 50 ensures pure image quality. Slight underexposure preserves details. Perfect for capturing real life moments

[Environment] Bright outdoor or indoor natural light [Scenes] Fresh Japanese portraits, campus, travel, daily life [Tips] Bright tones, higher saturation. Perfect for fresh, bright portraits and scenes. Seek well-lit scenes

[Environment] Snowy, overcast or low color temperature scenes [Scenes] Snow scenes, winter streets, warm indoor, festive atmosphere [Tips] Warm tones balance snow\'s coolness. Creates cozy atmosphere. Perfect for winter scenes and warm light environments

[Environment] Restaurants, kitchens, food photography scenes [Scenes] Food photography, beverages, baking, fine cuisine [Tips] Darker tones highlight food texture. Moderate saturation keeps food\'s true colors. Perfect for fine food and beverages

[Environment] Daylight outdoor or ample light [Scenes] Street, architecture, landscape, daily records [Tips] Simulates Leica\'s German style. Deep tones, restrained colors. Perfect for photography enthusiasts seeking Leica aesthetics

[Environment] Daylight outdoor or soft light [Scenes] Portraits, landscapes, Japanese scenes, artistic photography [Tips] Pro mode auto exposure. Slight overexposure creates dreamy feel. Vintage tones with dreamy soft light. Perfect for beautiful portraits and landscapes

[Environment] Well-lit outdoor or indoor [Scenes] Landscapes, architecture, portraits, artistic photography [Tips] Simulates Hasselblad Natural Color Solution. Rich but true-to-life colors. Perfect for high-quality color performance

[Environment] Sunny weather or bright vacation scenes [Scenes] Seaside, vacation, travel, summer outdoors [Tips] Bright and transparent tones. Lower saturation creates freshness. Perfect for vacation and travel scenes. Capture joyful moments

[Environment] Soft light or overcast [Scenes] Emotional portraits, artistic photography, still life, architecture [Tips] Retains slight color information. Dreamy soft light creates artistic feel. Perfect for expressive black and white photography

[Environment] Restaurants, cafés, cozy indoor [Scenes] Food, desserts, beverages, delicate items [Tips] Dreamy soft light creates warm atmosphere. Darker tones highlight texture. Perfect for fine food and cozy scenes

[Environment] Daylight outdoor or indoor, seaside, sky, water surface [Scenes] Landscapes, architecture, portraits, still life [Tips] Blue clarity style with cool tones creates fresh and transparent feel. Slight underexposure preserves details. Dreamy soft light adds atmosphere. Perfect for fresh landscapes and portraits

[Environment] Sunny outdoor, well-lit scenes [Scenes] Street, portraits, landscapes, vintage scenes [Tips] Sunny vintage style with 5000K color temp for natural colors. Negative tone creates vintage feel. Slight underexposure preserves highlight details. Warm soft light adds retro atmosphere. Perfect for sunny outdoor portraits and landscapes

[Environment] Night city, neon signs, bustling streets [Scenes] Night views, street scenes, portraits, urban landscapes [Tips] Neon lights style with rich filter enhancing color saturation. Gentle soft light creates dreamy feel. Slight underexposure preserves neon details. Perfect for night city neon scenes

[Environment] Old districts, vintage scenes, nostalgic indoor settings [Scenes] Old objects, street scenes, portraits, storytelling scenes [Tips] Retro nostalgia style with 65% vintage filter for nostalgic feel. Low tone adds retro atmosphere. Reduced saturation simulates old photo texture. Perfect for nostalgic themed photos
Rich preset parameters for various scenarios
Subscribe to cloud preset library with manual updates
Community-created presets with regular content updates
Local storage first, protecting user privacy
Pure local operation, data stored locally

OMaster is a color grading parameter management tool designed for OPPO/OnePlus/Realme mobile photography enthusiasts. Here, you can view, favorite, and reproduce Master Mode photography color grading parameters.
• View Master Mode color grading parameters • Support multiple preset styles • Pure local operation, data stored locally • No internet required
To provide better service, we use Umeng Analytics SDK to collect app usage data.

The app stores the following data locally:
• Subscription config (URL, version, etc.) • Preset image cache • User preferences (theme, language, etc.) • Favorite presets list
All data is stored on your device, we do not upload your personal information.

Floating window feature requires SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW permission to display shooting parameters over other apps. This permission is only used to display preset parameters, and will not access your screen content or collect any data.
You have the right to access, correct, and delete your personal information. To exercise these rights, please contact us through the in-app contact information.
To conveniently view parameters while shooting, OMaster needs floating window permission
1. Find "Allow display over other apps" or similar option in settings page
If you encounter permission activation failure:
Tap the ⋮ menu in the top right
Tip: After removing restrictions, please ensure only "Floating Window" permission is granted
If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact: Developer: Silas Email: iboy66lee@qq.com

This app is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). You are free to share and adapt this work, but you must follow these conditions:
You must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license
You may not use the material for commercial purposes
If you remix, transform, or build upon the material, you must distribute your contributions under the same license as the original
This app uses the following open source libraries. We thank all open source contributors:
Thanks to all developers who contribute to the open source community. It is your selfless dedication that makes this project possible.
Salute to all open source projects!
Master Mode Color Grading Library v%1$s
View professional photography color grading parameters for Master Mode
Support multiple preset styles to meet different shooting needs
Subscribe to community presets, continuously updated
I have read and agree to
• We use Umeng SDK for analytics • Collect device info to optimize app experience
Tap User Agreement & Privacy Policy to view details
To conveniently view parameters while shooting, OMaster needs floating window permission
Tip: After removing restrictions, ensure only "Floating Window" permission is granted
Note: Realme presets will automatically use standard floating window (compact mode icons are not compatible with Realme camera UI)
Daily color challenge, discover the city through colors
Take a color card, wander the streets, find matching colors, and capture the city\'s beauty
3 chances daily, get a random color mission
Go out with your card, find matching colors in the city
Photograph the colors, complete today\'s challenge
Daily color card challenge, discover the city through colors
Tap the button below to draw your exclusive color card
Are you sure you want to clear all history? This action cannot be undone.
Find red brick buildings, wooden doors, warm street lights, capture the city\'s warm texture
Seaside, sky, beach, record the tranquility and openness of the coast with fresh blue and white tones
Parks, trees, grass, find vitality and tranquility in nature\'s green
Steel structures, factories, bridges, show the power of industrial aesthetics with cool tones
Dusk, skyline, capture the romance and gentleness of the city under sunset glow
Night markets, neon signs, find the city\'s most dazzling colors in the night
Old streets, vintage items, retro scenes, record traces of time with film tones
Architectural lines, light and shadow contrast, show pure formal beauty with minimalist black and white
Flower paths, parks, spring scenes, record spring romance with pink tones
Cafes, bookstores, artsy shops, record leisure time with warm brown tones
Deep sea, aquariums, blue buildings, explore the mysterious ocean world with deep blue tones
Fallen leaves, autumn forests, golden streets, capture autumn poetry with warm tones
[Find] Red brick walls, old buildings, wooden frames, warm street lights [Tips] Use light-shadow contrast for depth, warm tones work well with backlight [Best Time] 3-5 PM, when sunlight is angled
[Find] Seaside boardwalks, blue sky, beaches, white buildings [Tips] Large white space for openness, horizontal composition [Best Time] Sunny morning, when sky is bluest
[Find] Park woods, grass, vines, moss [Tips] Use foreground leaves for depth, find light spots through canopy [Best Time] Early morning or dusk, soft light
[Find] Steel bridges, factory walls, pipes, concrete buildings [Tips] Emphasize geometric lines, low angle for power [Best Time] Overcast, even light
[Find] City skyline, building silhouettes, water reflections [Tips] Backlight for silhouettes, use water reflections [Best Time] 20 min after sunset, blue hour
[Find] Neon signs, night market stalls, light trails [Tips] Slight underexposure for neon details, use halos [Best Time] 8-10 PM, all neon lights on
[Find] Old streets, bookstores, retro cafes, vintage items [Tips] Find aged elements, leave white space for story [Best Time] Afternoon soft light, or indoor warm light
[Find] Modern architecture, geometric lines, strong light-shadow scenes [Tips] Simplify composition, emphasize shapes and textures [Best Time] Sunny, strongest light-shadow contrast
[Find] Cherry blossom paths, flower fields, parks [Tips] Use blurred foreground flowers for dreamy feel [Best Time] Early morning or dusk, soft light
[Find] Cafe interiors, bookshelves, coffee cups, artsy shops [Tips] Use window side light, warm tones for still life [Best Time] 2-4 PM, best indoor light
[Find] Aquariums, blue walls, deep pools, rainy scenes [Tips] Use water reflections, dark backgrounds [Best Time] Overcast or indoor, dimmer light
[Find] Leaf-covered paths, maple trees, autumn parks [Tips] Use fallen leaves as foreground, backlight for transparency [Best Time] Sunny afternoon, light through leaves
Find two warm building materials and one warm light source in the same frame.
Make the sky or sea occupy more than half of the frame and keep one bright accent.
Use foreground leaves to frame a quiet green subject with layered depth.
Shoot a low-angle composition using strong lines and one cool metallic color block.
Capture a warm-to-cool transition between the skyline and the sky.
Find a neon scene with one dominant color and one small contrasting highlight.
Photograph an object or corner that feels like it has a story from another decade.
Reduce the frame to bold shapes, clean lines, and only one visual subject.
Use soft light and floral tones to create one airy, romantic composition.
Build a cozy still life with coffee tones, paper texture, or warm window light.
Look for layered blues and add a reflective surface to deepen the atmosphere.
Use fallen leaves or golden foliage as foreground to make the season feel tangible.
More features are on the way...
Keep a record of your shooting rhythm
Active for %1$d days in a row
No activity recorded for this day yet.
Today’s shooting task was marked complete.
A color card or related inspiration was saved today.
You opened Discover and left a trace for today.
